qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Custom filter query injection enables arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies attacker-controlled query strings reaching dtale/query.py::run_query and pandas DataFrame.query, the same patched code-injection sink used by the advisory's /save-column-filter column-filter path.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing authorization checks allow unauthorized access to all datasets
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns dataset authorization and enumerable data_id access, not code injection through /save-column-filter or pandas query evaluation.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unrestricted SSRF in web upload endpoint enables internal network access
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets arbitrary URL fetching in the web upload flow, which is a different endpoint, sink, and root cause from the advisory's column-filter code injection.

selected_finding.title: Custom filter query injection enables arbitrary code execution

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory's DataFrame.query code-injection root cause. The copied judge PoC exercised the advisory-specific /save-column-filter path and showed the malicious saved filter reaching dtale/query.py::run_query, but the captured run did not produce command-execution proof.
evidence: The advisory names D-Tale RCE through /save-column-filter and references commit 431c6148d3c799de20e1dec86c4432f48e3d0746, which adds validation in dtale/column_filters.py and dtale/query.py before DataFrame.query.
custom_filter_code_injection/vulnerability_report.json identifies unsanitized query strings reaching dtale/query.py::run_query and pandas DataFrame.query as a code execution sink.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_c5885cb5/.judge/poc_runs/custom_filter_code_injection/evidence.json records response_status=200 from /dtale/save-column-filter/1 and a built_query equal to the attacker-controlled payload.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_c5885cb5/.judge/poc_runs/custom_filter_code_injection/run.log shows the path reaching dtale/query.py:165 and pandas DataFrame.query before raising AttributeError; evidence.json records proof_exists=false.
blockers_to_higher_tier: The copied PoC did not create /tmp/evohunt_save_column_filter_rce.txt or otherwise demonstrate attacker-controlled command execution in the captured environment.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied harness installed dtale==3.19.1, sent an outlier filter payload to /dtale/save-column-filter/1, received success=true, built the exact attacker-controlled query, and reached dtale/query.py::run_query/DataFrame.query. The run raised AttributeError before creating the proof file, so it activated the advisory logic without demonstrating command execution.
